title: Change status based on a date
excerpt: Hey guys, I would like to set a status based on a date column. For example; “set the status to “Week One”, when date is current week”. Is this possible or would a formula column be better suited to create the automation …

posts.author: bbyrne (Brandon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey guys, I would like to set a status based on a date column. For example; “set the status to “Week One”, when date is current week”. Is this possible or would a formula column be better suited to create the automation off of?
